## Category
**Cluster:** AI / ML Security

---

## Product Brief
1. Unbound AI provides secure AI access and management for enterprises, focusing on governing AI coding agents.
2. Their core technology is the Agent Access Security Broker (AASB) platform, which discovers AI coding agents, assesses their risk, and enforces granular policies.
3. The platform offers real-time visibility, control, and protection for generative AI tools, redacting sensitive information and routing high-risk requests to private models.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Unbound AI announced the Agent Access Security Broker (AASB), a new market category for governing AI coding agents, ahead of RSAC 2026.
- They introduced their AASB platform, designed to discover AI coding agents, assess their risk, and enforce guardrails over their actions.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How does the AASB platform integrate with existing enterprise security infrastructure?
- [ ] What specific types of AI coding agents does the AASB platform support and govern?
- [ ] Can Unbound AI provide case studies or examples of how their platform has reduced AI-related security risks for customers?
